selection: average HTP impact of the city, canton, workplaces and insurance of Zurich

words.name: City of Zurich
words.description: the municipality of Zurich, the largest city of Switzerland

words.name: Canton of Zurich
words.description: the most populous canton of Switzerland

words.name: Zurich Insurance
words.description: Zurich Insurance Group, a global multi-line insurer headquartered in Zurich

words.name: City of Zurich workplaces
words.description: the City of Zurich seen as an employer location, hosting the jobs within the municipality including commuters

words.name: entity
words.description: an organisation or administrative body that can influence people

words.name: inhabitant
words.description: a person who lives in a place

words.name: customer
words.description: a person served by a commercial entity

words.name: employed person
words.description: a person holding a job located in the place, residents and commuters alike

words.name: person influenced
words.description: the number of people an entity influences, inhabitants for a region, customers for a company or employed persons for a workplace

words.name: happy time point
words.description: HTP, the UN DALY index extended to the lowest two levels of the Maslow pyramid

words.name: impact factor on HTP
words.description: the share of one person's happy time points that the entity influences

words.name: impact weighted reach
words.description: persons influenced multiplied by the impact factor on HTP, expressed in HTP-units

words.name: average impact weighted reach
words.description: the mean impact weighted reach across the listed entities

verbs.name: is a
verbs.description: link a word to its parent type

formulas.name: impact weighted reach calculation
formulas.description: multiply the number of persons influenced by the impact factor on the happy time points
formulas.expression: "impact weighted reach" = "person influenced" * "impact factor on HTP"

formulas.name: average impact weighted reach calculation
formulas.description: mean of the impact weighted reach across the four Zurich entities
formulas.expression: "average impact weighted reach" = sum( "impact weighted reach" ) / count( "entity" )
